sections.paragraph: an unused root, prop. to scatter, to disperse, like the Syr. ܒܙܰܩ; Arab. بزق is, to spit, to sow seed, also to arise (as the sun); prop. to scatter rays, in which signification of radiating and shining forth it appears to be kindred to the root בָּרַק (as to ז and ר being interchanged, see ). Hence ἅπαξ λεγόμ.-
